creator: rrsum@summerhill.org
text: Could someone fill me in on the status of this bug?  I have updated to 13.1-RELEASE (uname -mrsv:  FreeBSD 13.1-RELEASE FreeBSD 13.1-RELEASE releng/13.1-n250148-fc952ac2212 GENERIC amd64) and the problem persists, except when the boot loader contains:  vfs.root_mount_always_wait=1.  I do not have a zfs root drive, but I fiddled with the suggestions made by Christos (with /etc/zfs/zpool.cache) to no avail.  Is this just relegated to a future version?
